stemHtml: An aircraft is flying at FL80 with a groundspeed of 64 kt, heading to an airfield having an elevation of 234 ft. The QNH at the airfield is 1003 hPa (assume 30 ft / hPa). What minimum rate of descent is required to reach the airfield elevation, if the airfield is 7.1 NM away from the aircraft’s current position?
